articles.title: Driver arrested after early‑morning crash in Scarborough; firearm found inside vehicle
articles.summary: Toronto police say a man has been arrested after an early‑morning collision in Scarborough where officers also located a firearm inside the vehicle. Emergency crews were called around 4:45 a.m. on Friday to Kennedy Road and Passmore Avenue for reports of a single‑vehicle crash. Police told CityNews a man in his 20s was transported to […]

articles.title: Trial of man accused of killing Montreal daughter continues in New York
articles.summary: ELIZABETHTOWN — A New York jury is expected to hear testimony from more police officers as the trial of a man accused of killing his nine-year-old daughter resumes.

articles.title: More than 1,000 scrap tires are piled at this Toronto auto shop. No recyclers will take them, owner says
articles.summary: A Scarborough auto repair shop owner says he has been told by the city to clear more than a thousand scrap tires from his business, but he cannot get anyone to pick them up following changes to provincial tire recycling rules.

articles.title: Next stop, Trump Station? Administration wants to rename New York’s Penn Station
articles.summary: NEW YORK (AP) — Will President Donald Trump ’s name grace one of the most famous -- and sometimes maligned -- landmarks in his hometown of New York City?

articles.title: Suspects posing as landscapers are behind string of break-ins in Durham Region: police
articles.summary: Durham Regional Police are warning residents after a string of break-ins they say were committed by suspects posing as landscapers.

articles.title: Newly retired Brampton couple wins $70M Lotto Max jackpot
articles.summary: A newly retired Brampton couple says retirement will be "next level" now they have won a life-changing $70-million Lotto Max jackpot.
